blockingIssues.description: docs/creating-plugins.md documents onConnectionValidate as a working runtime hook for accepting/rejecting connections, but current flow validation code path does not dispatch this hook in runtime (only tests reference dispatch), which can mislead plugin authors.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen docs-worker verification guidance to require call-site validation for documented extension points (verify where hooks are dispatched), not just presence of types/enums.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for plugin-authoring-docs found onConnectionValidate documented as active behavior while app/lib/flow/context.tsx runtime connection validation does not dispatch that hook.
